title: Smoky Portuguese Paella
description: A twist on the classic Spanish dish, this smoky paella is infused with the flavors of Portugal. Perfect for a hearty dinner.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large paella pan over medium heat.
Add the chorizo and cook until browned, about 2 minutes.
Add the Portuguese sausage and cook until browned, about 2 minutes.
Add the chicken and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the shrimp and cook until pink, about 2-3 minutes.
Add the garlic, smoked paprika, and red bell pepper. Cook for 1 minute.
Add the white wine and cook until the liquid is almost completely reduced, about 2-3 minutes.
Add the fluffy white rice and stir to coat the rice in the oil and mix with the other ingredients.
Add 2 cups of water to the pan and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20-25 minutes or until the rice is cooked and the liquid has been absorbed.
Remove the pan from the heat and let rest for 5 minutes before serving.
